_note: D3.A.3 schema ripple — circuits[0].row_index=2 is a placeholder picked from the median row of the single-circuit v1.1 grid. INV-4 ('luminaire_ids share row_index OR adjacent') will mark this as a HIGH violation once B.4 ships, because the single circuit feeds 5 rows. B.1 will re-circuit this example into 5 row-circuits as part of the canonical lumen-method walk; the resulting INV-4 PASS will replace this placeholder.

assumptions: UF = 0.67 from standard reflectance table — confirm from photometric data
MF = 0.80 for clean office LED — confirm cleaning schedule with FM

v1.6.0 → v1.7.0 D5 retrofit: zone Z2 defaults to purpose='task' (ZP-01); all 20 luminaires default to mount_type='recessed' (MT-01); per_zone_achieved[] populated from existing achieved_illuminance_lux. Defaults preserve v1.6.0 behaviour — no change to lumen-method calc or layout.

drawing_notes: All luminaires: 600×600 LED recessed panel, 4500 lm, 36W, 4000K, CRI ≥ 80
Maintained illuminance: 500 lux, UGR ≤ 19 per BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3
Ceiling grid: 600mm module assumed — confirm from architect's reflected ceiling plan

selection_source.citation: CIBSE LG7 §6.2 (typical recessed LED panel UF + SHR_max) + BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 (LLMF maintenance categories)

rationale.chat_summary: 20 × 600×600 LED panel layout for 80 m² open-plan office. Target 500 lx achieved at 603 lx (UF=0.67, MF=0.80); single 6 A Type C circuit on DB L1 at 720 W. Two assumptions on UF and MF flagged — confirm against the luminaire's photometric datasheet. Reply to refine, e.g. 'use LED downlights instead'.

sections.title: Illumination
sections.summary: Target 500 lx (open-plan office, BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3); achieved 603 lx maintained.

decisions.label: Lux target 500 lx maintained
decisions.summary: BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.3 entry for open_plan_office sets 500 lx.
decisions.rule: BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.3 entry for open_plan_office

decisions.label: UGR ≤ 19 (confirm from photometric)
decisions.summary: Table 5.3 sets UGR limit 19 for office work; lumen method cannot verify — confirm from the luminaire's UGR table.

sections.title: Layout
sections.summary: 20 luminaires on a 4-wide × 5-deep grid; 50 mm snap; ceiling grid 600 mm respected.

decisions.label: N = 17 minimum from lumen method, rounded up to 20 for grid symmetry
decisions.summary: Lumen method gives 16.58; rounded UP to 17; 20 chosen to fill the 4×5 grid evenly.

sections.title: Circuits
sections.summary: Single 6 A Type C MCB on DB L1; load 720 W is 39 % of the 1840 W 80%-rule headroom.

decisions.label: 6 A Type C MCB on DB L1
decisions.summary: 20 × 36 W = 720 W well within 230 V × 6 A × 0.8 = 1104 W; chose 6 A to leave 10 A headroom for shared neutrals.

sections.title: Switching
sections.summary: Single 1-gang switch at the entrance, latch-side, 1200 mm AFF.

decisions.label: Switch at room entrance, latch side, 1200 mm AFF
decisions.summary: BS 7671 requires switching within reach of the entry door; placed on the latch side for accessibility.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: Two design assumptions — must be confirmed against the photometric datasheet before issue.

decisions.label: UF = 0.67
decisions.summary: From CIBSE SLL standard reflectance table 0.7/0.5/0.2 for an indoor office.

decisions.label: MF = 0.80
decisions.summary: Clean office LED on a 3-year cleaning cycle.
decisions.rule: CIBSE TM 3-25 / standard MF for clean office LED

sections.title: v1.7 retrofit
sections.summary: D5 retrofit (2026-06-03): zone Z2 receives purpose='task' (ZP-01 default) and em_target_lux=500 (Table 5 open_plan_office); all 20 luminaires receive mount_type='recessed' (MT-01 default); per_zone_achieved[] populated from existing achieved_illuminance_lux=603. Engineering content unchanged.

decisions.label: Default purpose='task' for Z2 (ZP-01)
decisions.summary: v1.6.0 example pre-dates the §4.2.2 area split. Backwards-compat default ZP-01 maps the single 'Interior' zone to purpose='task' — the only valid interpretation for an open-plan office room with a 500 lx Em target.

decisions.label: Default mount_type='recessed' (MT-01)
decisions.summary: Existing example was authored with 600×600 LED ceiling-grid panels — physically recessed by definition. MT-01 default chosen; z_mm + suspension_length_mm omitted per recessed convention (inherits ceiling_height_mm=3000).

invariants.evidence: Lumen method: N=20 luminaires × 4500 lm × UF=0.67 × MF=0.80 / 80 m² = achieved_illuminance_lux=603 lux ≥ target 500 lux (Rule 1 PASS). Calculation per [spacing-rules#lumen-method-formula] + ontology LED_PANEL_600 UF table at RI=1.98, reflectances 0.7_0.5_0.2.
S/H ratio: Hm=2250 mm, SHR_max=1.5 (LED_PANEL_600 ontology default), limit=3375 mm. S_x=2400 mm ≤ 3375 PASS; S_y=1600 mm ≤ 3375 PASS. Per [spacing-rules#shr-max-default].

Switch coverage: 1 entrance declared, 1 switch emitted (SW01 at (200, 200), 1200 mm AFF, latch side per door_swing). switches.length >= entrances.length (Rule 3a PASS). Height + latch placement per [switching-rules#height] + [switching-rules#latch-side] (Rule 3b PASS).

Circuit topology: all 20 luminaires on circuit L1-Z2 share row_index spans 0..4 — this example pre-D3 used single-circuit layout; INV-4 trivially PASS (all luminaires on one circuit; no Z-pattern possible). homerun_endpoint = (0, 4000, W) sits on west wall (Rule 4b PASS). Canonical 5-row-circuit re-tested example lands in C.3 (uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali).
Circuit load: total_load_w = 720 W <= 0.8 x 6 x 230 = 1104 W (6 A MCB, per circuits[0].mcb_rating_a). Rule 5 PASS per BS 7671 §433.1.1 + IET OSG App A 80% continuous-load rule.

Part L compliance: inputs.is_uk_new_build flag absent in office-open-plan input (legacy v1.3 example pre-dates Part L gating). Rule 6 trivially PASS — no Part L assessment required when is_uk_new_build is absent/false. controls.lamp_efficacy_lm_per_w=125 records the value for future audit but no Rule 6 enforcement triggered.

Zone assignment: 20 luminaires all in Z2 (interior). Glazed walls = [] -> no perimeter zone (consistency PASS per [switching-rules#perimeter-circuit]). No task or emergency zones declared for this example. Rule 7 PASS per [control-rules#part-l-daylight].

selection_source.photometric_source='ontology_default'; citation='CIBSE LG7 §6.2 (typical recessed LED panel UF + SHR_max) + BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 (LLMF maintenance categories)'. No inputs.photometric_override supplied for this example. Rule 8 PASS.

drafting_furniture present with all 4 required blocks (title_block + scale_bar + dimensions[2] + luminaire_schedule). All annotations declare font_family='Arial' + explicit font_size_pt ∈ {8, 10}. No {{placeholder}} remnants in any text field. Rule 9 PASS.

Schema validation PASSED (precondition: golden CI gate 225/225). All top-level required fields populated: drawing_type, version, room, calculation_summary, rationale, invariants, plus full_drawing-mode required: luminaire_type, luminaires, switches, circuits, controls, drawing_notes, zones, drafting_furniture, selection_source. non_compliance_flags = [] (vacuously valid). Rule 10 PASS.

Photometric cascade resolved: consumed_intents.photometric_grid sourced from cascade-office-open-plan/intent-out.json. payload.task_area_compliant=true; payload.achieved_avg_illuminance_lux=603 vs target=500 (sub-check 3 PASS); 0 non_compliance_flags cascaded to lighting-layout calculation_summary with _cascaded_from=photometric-analysis attribution (sub-check 4 PASS, vacuously). Cascade per skill.manifest.json consumes_intents trigger 'mode == full_drawing'.

Zone purpose required + valid. Zones inspected: 1. Per-zone purpose: Z2: purpose=task, em_target_lux=500. Orphan-surrounding check: pass (no surrounding zones present, so check vacuous). All zones declare purpose ∈ {task, surrounding, background, circulation}. INV-13 PASS. Citation: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2.1 (task area) + area-definitions.json §4.2.2.1.

Surrounding ratio compliance. Surrounding zones inspected: 0. No zones declare purpose='surrounding' — INV-14 vacuous PASS per validator §INV-14 vacuous condition. Citation: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2.2 + Table 6 (area-definitions.json table_6_ratio_rules.task_to_surrounding).

Background floor. Background zones inspected: 0. No zones declare purpose='background' — INV-15 vacuous PASS per validator §INV-15 vacuous condition. Citation: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.2.2.3 + Table 6 (area-definitions.json table_6_ratio_rules.task_to_background).

mount_type ↔ z_mm/suspension consistency. Luminaires inspected: 20. Pendant geometry checks: 0 pendant luminaires. Suspended geometry checks: 0 suspended luminaires. Recessed/surface/track: 20 luminaires (all 20 LED panels are mount_type='recessed'), z_mm omitted per MT-01 convention (recessed inherits ceiling_height_mm=3000). INV-16 vacuous PASS — no pendant/suspended geometry to verify. Citation: BS EN 60598-2-1 + mount-type-rules.yaml MT-01.

Ceiling clearance + working-plane floor. Working plane reference: 750 mm AFF. Per-luminaire floor check: all 20 luminaires are recessed; z_mm not declared and inherits ceiling_height_mm=3000 per MT-01 convention. Inherited z=3000 > working_plane=750 (clearance=2250 mm). Per-luminaire ceiling clearance: recessed luminaires are physically inset into ceiling, suspension_length_mm=0 implied; sum=3000 ≤ ceiling=3000 PASS. INV-17 PASS — no luminaire below task plane, no luminaire exceeds ceiling. Citation: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 + BS EN 60598-2 + MT-04.

hm_mm derivation consistency. Room hm_mm recorded: 2250 mm. Lowest pendant/suspended z_mm: N/A (no pendant/suspended — all 20 luminaires recessed). Recessed branch: expected hm_mm = ceiling_height_mm − working_plane_mm = 3000 − 750 = 2250 mm. Drift: |2250 − 2250| = 0 mm, tolerance ±50 mm. INV-18 PASS. Citation: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 + repo derivation convention.

Per-zone achievement. Zones inspected: 1. Per-zone achievement: Z2 (task): target=500, achieved=603, gap=-103, gap_pct=-20.6%, ratio_compliance=pass, severity=none (achieved ≥ target). Aggregate: 1 PASS, 0 marginal, 0 MEDIUM, 0 HIGH. INV-19 PASS. Citation: BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.1 + Table 5 (lux-levels.json open_plan_office entry, Em=500 lx).
